title: ranunculus ficaria subsp. ficariiformis
intro: Ranunculus ficaria subsp. ficariiformis, also known as lesser celandine, is a perennial plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, including bronchitis and coughs. Lesser celandine can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
